Equipment Finance Success Stories

Equipment Finance

Commercial Excavation Contractor

$320,000
Equipment Finance Package

Business Background

Established excavation and earthmoving contractor serving commercial construction projects across South East Queensland. 8-year track record with consistent revenue growth and strong client relationships with major construction companies.

Challenge

Contractor identified significant opportunity to expand operations with larger commercial projects requiring additional heavy machinery. Traditional bank financing proved inadequate for specialised equipment requirements.

Solution

EVFBS structured a comprehensive equipment finance package covering:

  • New 30-tonne excavator: $185,000
  • Articulated dump truck: $95,000
  • Compaction equipment: $40,000

5-year terms with competitive rates and seasonal payment flexibility aligned to project cash flow.

Outcome

40% Increase in project capacity
$180K Additional annual revenue
6 months ROI achievement timeline
"The strategic approach from EVFBS transformed our capability to take on larger commercial projects. The equipment finance structure aligned perfectly with our cash flow, and we've already secured three major contracts that wouldn't have been possible before."
— Commercial Excavation Director, South East Queensland
Equipment Finance

Steel Fabrication Business

$450,000
Industrial Equipment Finance

Business Background

Specialised steel fabrication company serving mining and industrial sectors. 12-year operational history with focus on custom fabrication and maintenance services for heavy industry.

Challenge

Growing demand for precision manufacturing required investment in CNC machinery and automated welding systems. Existing equipment limiting capacity to meet client requirements and quality standards.

Solution

Strategic equipment finance for advanced manufacturing capability including CNC plasma cutting system, automated welding cells, and precision measurement equipment with technology refresh provisions.

Outcome

65% Production efficiency gain
$320K Annual revenue increase
"The precision equipment has revolutionised our manufacturing capability. We're now the preferred supplier for several major mining companies, and our quality certification opened doors we couldn't access before."
— Manufacturing Director, Industrial Fabrication Company

Commercial Property Finance Success Stories

Commercial Property

Plumbing Contractor Workshop

$850,000
Commercial Property Finance

Business Background

Established commercial plumbing contractor specialising in multi-story buildings and industrial installations. Strong financial position with consistent growth over 15 years, transitioning from rental premises to property ownership.

Challenge

Rising commercial rental costs and limited workshop space constraining business growth. Identified strategic property acquisition opportunity requiring commercial finance structure beyond traditional residential lending.

Solution

EVFBS structured commercial property finance for purpose-built workshop facility including:

  • 2,400sqm workshop with overhead crane capability
  • Office complex and staff facilities
  • Specialised storage for materials and equipment
  • Future expansion provisions within property

20-year term with competitive commercial property rates and tax-effective structure.

Outcome

$4,200 Monthly rental savings
50% Operational space increase
$280K Property appreciation (18 months)
"Owning our workshop has been transformational. The operational efficiency gains and rental savings have already improved our profit margins, whilst building significant equity for future growth initiatives."
— Managing Director, Commercial Plumbing Services
Commercial Property

Logistics Warehouse Investment

$1.2M
Investment Property Finance

Business Background

Transport and logistics company with interstate operations. Seeking commercial property investment to diversify business interests whilst securing long-term operational base.

Challenge

Required strategic property acquisition for operational use with investment returns. Complex financing needs involving commercial property purchase with development potential for future expansion.

Solution

Structured commercial investment property finance for strategically located warehouse facility with dual-purpose capability as operational base and investment asset with tenant potential.

Outcome

8.2% Annual investment yield
$95K Annual operational savings
"The commercial property investment strategy has delivered both operational benefits and strong investment returns. It's providing a solid foundation for our business expansion plans."
— Operations Director, Logistics Company

Working Capital & Cash Flow Success Stories

Working Capital

Civil Infrastructure Contractor

$500,000
Working Capital Facility

Business Background

Established civil contracting company specialising in infrastructure projects including road construction, utility installation, and site development for government and commercial clients.

Challenge

Secured $2.1M government infrastructure project with extended payment terms creating significant cash flow gap. Required working capital to cover labour, materials, and equipment costs during project execution phase.

Solution

EVFBS structured flexible working capital facility including:

  • Revolving credit line for operational expenses
  • Progress payment financing against certified work
  • Equipment rental and subcontractor payment support
  • Retention release provisions aligned to project milestones

Outcome

18% Project margin achievement
$380K Project profit realised
3 months Early project completion
"The working capital facility enabled us to execute the project without cash flow stress. We delivered ahead of schedule and have since secured two additional major contracts based on our performance."
— Project Director, Civil Infrastructure Company
Working Capital

Landscaping & Irrigation Contractor

$180,000
Seasonal Working Capital

Business Background

Commercial landscaping and irrigation specialist serving golf courses, sporting facilities, and commercial developments. Seasonal revenue patterns with peak activity during spring and autumn months.

Challenge

Significant seasonal variations in cash flow with major project commencements requiring upfront material purchases and labour scheduling before payment milestones.

Solution

Designed seasonal working capital facility with flexible drawdown and repayment structure aligned to business cash flow patterns, including provisions for equipment rental and material purchases.

Outcome

45% Revenue growth achieved
$85K Additional annual profit
"The seasonal facility perfectly matches our business cycle. We can now take on larger projects knowing we have the working capital support to deliver without cash flow constraints."
— Business Owner, Commercial Landscaping Services

Invoice Financing Success Stories

Invoice Financing

Commercial Electrical Contractor

$250,000
Invoice Financing Facility

Business Background

Established electrical contracting company specialising in commercial fit-outs and industrial installations. Consistent revenue growth with strong client base including major construction companies and property developers.

Challenge

Rapid business growth creating cash flow timing issues with 60-90 day payment terms from major clients. Required immediate access to invoice values to fund ongoing operations and new project materials.

Solution

EVFBS implemented selective invoice financing facility providing:

  • 85% advance on approved invoices within 24 hours
  • Flexible facility allowing selective invoice financing
  • Direct client payment collection management
  • Credit protection on major client accounts

Outcome

75% Cash flow improvement
$420K Additional project capacity
24 hours Average funding timeframe
"Invoice financing transformed our cash flow management. We can now take on multiple projects simultaneously without waiting for payments, and our growth has accelerated significantly."
— Managing Director, Commercial Electrical Services
Invoice Financing

Commercial HVAC Services

$320,000
Trade Finance Facility

Business Background

Specialised HVAC contractor serving commercial buildings, industrial facilities, and healthcare institutions. Focus on maintenance contracts and system installations with blue-chip client base.

Challenge

Large maintenance contracts requiring significant parts inventory and specialist labour scheduling. Extended payment terms creating working capital pressure during peak service periods.

Solution

Comprehensive trade finance solution combining invoice financing with inventory funding and equipment lease arrangements to support complete business operation requirements.

Outcome

55% Service capacity increase
$280K Annual revenue growth
"The integrated finance solution supports every aspect of our operation. We've secured three major maintenance contracts that we couldn't have serviced without this financial backing."
— Operations Manager, Commercial HVAC Services
